title: Aani Baani
overview: Abhimanyu in his fifties. An honest man, he minds his own business,married to Vimal for the past 20 years. However, Vimal still teases Abhimanyu to remarry. This story revolves around the Emergency period during the 70's that also unveils the life incidents of Abhimanyu and Vimal.
